Class Relationship

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.models.Relationship
public class Relationship extends Object
Encapsulates the social connection between two Sims, tracking a numeric friendship score and a categorical RelationshipStatus.

The friendship score ranges from 0 to 100. As the score changes via social interactions, calling updateStatus() re-evaluates the categorical status against predefined thresholds.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Relationship(Sim targetSim)
    Constructs a new relationship with a starting score of 0 and status of RelationshipStatus.STRANGER.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getFriendshipScore()
    Returns the numeric friendship score (0–100).
    RelationshipStatus
    getStatus()
    Returns the current categorical relationship status.
    Sim
    getTargetSim()
    Returns the other Sim in this relationship.
    void
    setFriendshipScore(int friendshipScore)
    Sets the friendship score, clamped to the range [0, 100].
    void
    updateStatus()
    Re-evaluates the categorical status based on the current friendship score thresholds: 80+ → RelationshipStatus.ROMANTIC 50–79 → RelationshipStatus.FRIEND 20–49 → RelationshipStatus.ACQUAINTANCE 0–19 → RelationshipStatus.STRANGER

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Relationship

      public Relationship(Sim targetSim)
      Constructs a new relationship with a starting score of 0 and status of RelationshipStatus.STRANGER.
      Parameters:
      targetSim - the other Sim in this relationship.

  • Method Details

    • getTargetSim

      public Sim getTargetSim()
      Returns the other Sim in this relationship.
      Returns:
      the target Sim.

    • getFriendshipScore

      public int getFriendshipScore()
      Returns the numeric friendship score (0–100).
      Returns:
      the friendship score.

    • getStatus

      public RelationshipStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current categorical relationship status.
      Returns:
      the RelationshipStatus.

    • setFriendshipScore

      public void setFriendshipScore(int friendshipScore)
      Sets the friendship score, clamped to the range [0, 100].
      Parameters:
      friendshipScore - the new friendship score.

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus()
      Re-evaluates the categorical status based on the current friendship score thresholds:
      • 80+ → RelationshipStatus.ROMANTIC
      • 50–79 → RelationshipStatus.FRIEND
      • 20–49 → RelationshipStatus.ACQUAINTANCE
      • 0–19 → RelationshipStatus.STRANGER
